top_signals.title: BP’s High-Stakes Reboot Descended Into an Ugly Boardroom Drama
top_signals.summary: When Albert Manifold was hired as chairman of BP Plc, he joked to friends the company needed a “gurrier” — Irish slang for a savvy and scrappy streetfighter — to help turn its fortunes around.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Chinese-speaking fraud gang could be stealing millions from 2026 World Cup fans
top_signals.summary: Cybercriminals have registered more than 4,300 fraudulent domains impersonating FIFA's official web presence since August 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
